conversation.content: How do I reset my enterprise account password?

To reset your enterprise account password, navigate to Settings > Security > Password Reset. Click 'Send Reset Link' and check your registered email within 5 minutes. The link expires after 24 hours. If you don't receive it, verify your email address in Account Settings or contact your organization admin.
What is the refund policy for annual subscriptions?

Our annual subscription refund policy allows full refunds within 30 days of purchase. After 30 days, prorated refunds are available for unused months. Enterprise contracts may have custom terms — check your agreement or contact your account manager for specifics.
My API integration is returning 403 errors. How can I troubleshoot?

A 403 error typically indicates an authentication or permission issue. First, verify your API key is valid and has not expired in the Developer Console. Ensure the key has the required scopes for the endpoint you're calling. Check that your IP is whitelisted if your organization uses IP restrictions. Review the API documentation for rate limits.
Can you explain the difference between Standard and Enterprise plans?

Standard plan includes up to 50 users, 100GB storage, and email support with 24-hour response time. Enterprise plan offers unlimited users, 1TB+ storage, dedicated account manager, SSO/SAML integration, custom SLA, and priority 24/7 support. Enterprise also includes advanced audit logs and compliance certifications.
How do I add a new team member to my organization workspace?

Go to Admin Console > Team Management > Invite Members. Enter the new member's email address and select their role (Viewer, Editor, or Admin). They'll receive an invitation email valid for 7 days. You can also bulk-import members via CSV upload in the same section.
Is two-factor authentication available for all account types?

Yes, two-factor authentication (2FA) is available for all account types at no additional cost. Enable it under Settings > Security > Two-Factor Authentication. We support authenticator apps (TOTP), SMS, and hardware security keys (FIDO2). Organization admins can enforce 2FA for all members via Admin Console.
How can I export my project data before canceling my subscription?

Before canceling, export your data via Settings > Data Management > Export All Data. Choose your preferred format (JSON, CSV, or ZIP archive). Exports are processed within 24 hours and delivered via secure download link. After cancellation, data is retained for 90 days before permanent deletion.
What compliance certifications does the platform hold?

Our platform maintains SOC 2 Type II, ISO 27001, GDPR compliance, and HIPAA BAA availability for Enterprise customers. Compliance documentation and audit reports are accessible through the Trust Center in your Admin Console. Contact your account manager for custom compliance requirements.
I'm getting timeout errors when running batch processing jobs.

Batch processing timeouts usually occur when jobs exceed the default 30-minute limit. Check your job configuration for batch size — reducing it often resolves timeouts. Verify your data input format matches the API schema. For large datasets, consider splitting into multiple smaller jobs or upgrading to Enterprise for extended timeout limits.
How do I configure SSO with Okta for my organization?

SSO with Okta requires an Enterprise plan. In Admin Console > Security > SSO Configuration, select Okta as your identity provider. Enter your Okta domain and upload the SAML metadata XML. Map Okta attributes to platform user fields. Test the connection before enabling enforced SSO for all users.
Can I schedule automated reports to be sent weekly?

Yes, scheduled reports are available on Standard and Enterprise plans. Navigate to Analytics > Reports > Schedule. Select your report template, choose recipients, and set the frequency (daily, weekly, or monthly). Reports are delivered as PDF or CSV attachments. Enterprise users can also configure custom report templates.
What's the process for requesting a custom integration?

Custom integrations are available for Enterprise customers. Submit a request through your account manager or the Support Portal under 'Custom Integration Request.' Include your use case, required data flows, and timeline. Our solutions team typically responds within 3 business days with a feasibility assessment and project scope.
